lessons.title: Introduction to Firewalls: The Security Gatekeepers
lessons.description: Understand the role of firewalls in network security and the basic concepts of perimeter defense.

lessons.title: Types of Firewalls: Packet Filtering, Stateful, and Next-Gen
lessons.description: Explore the evolution of firewalls from simple packet filters to intelligent application-aware systems.

lessons.title: Access Control Lists (ACLs): The Rulebook
lessons.description: Learn the syntax and logic of ACLs – the fundamental building blocks of firewall rules.

lessons.title: Designing and Implementing Firewall Rules
lessons.description: Best practices for rule ordering, implicit deny, and avoiding common misconfigurations.

lessons.title: Firewall Architectures and Best Practices
lessons.description: DMZ designs, high availability, segmentation, and modern firewall deployment strategies.
